misc.text: What a question mate, Rayleigh would beat him. I see Rayleigh around the lvl of Oden who was equal to Kaido in wano kuni. In GV Kaido is still a rookie... Make it Wano Kuni 20 years ago and we have a match. Current Kaido beats Rayleigh. 𒉭Xavi𒉭 (@BlacktyonteXavi) Fan animation (By Torra Tv) God Valley Kaido Vs Rayleigh! misc.text: The best way of Code to redeem himself is by killing off people close to Boruto. Ikemoto needs to hold his balls in his hands and start to write the story with a darker and more emotional tone - Code would be the perfect guy for this… #BORUTO Anime Explained (@NarutoExplained) Code is either going to have the biggest comeback of all time or he’s gonna be taken out like trash the moment someone gets tired of his shit.
